description: Archive the original source file into {PROJECT_ROOT}/vault/originals/ with a stable filename. This is a pure file-move step; no parsing or interpretation.

project.description: Canonical project id, e.g. 'ecr-ecn'. Used to derive {PROJECT_ROOT} = projects/{project}/

source_path.description: Absolute path to the incoming file (may live outside the project tree, e.g. C:/Users/xxx/Downloads/foo.xlsx)

target_filename.description: Optional. Desired archived filename. Defaults to basename(source_path). Collisions resolved by appending _v2, _v3, etc.

operation_id.description: Optional workflow-level operation id for idempotency tracking. Leader may pass an existing id; otherwise one will be generated by the ingest step.

archived_path.description: Absolute path inside {PROJECT_ROOT}/vault/originals/ after archiving. Must contain the literal segment 'vault/originals/' to satisfy workflow required_outputs.

archived_size_bytes.description: Size of the archived file in bytes. Used downstream for traceability.

sha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the archived bytes. Later steps use this to detect duplicate ingestions.

renamed_from.description: If the target filename collided and was suffixed, the original requested basename.

archived_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the archive completed.
